sentences.target: Je sors la poubelle avant de partir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə sɔʁ la pubɛl avɑ̃ də paʁtiʁ/

translations.fr: Je sors la poubelle avant de partir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə sɔʁ la pubɛl avɑ̃ də paʁtiʁ/
translations.en: I take out the trash before leaving.
translations.es: Saco la basura antes de irme.
translations.de: Ich bringe den Müll raus, bevor ich losgehe.
translations.it: Porto fuori la spazzatura prima di uscire.
translations.zh-Hans: 我出门前把垃圾拿出去。
translations.pt: Eu levo o lixo para fora antes de sair.
translations.he: אני מוציא את הזבל לפני שאני יוצא.
translations.vi: Tôi mang rác ra ngoài trước khi đi.
translations.nl: Ik zet het vuilnis buiten voordat ik vertrek.
translations.hi: मैं निकलने से पहले कूड़ा बाहर निकालता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg tar ut søpla før jeg drar.
translations.sv: Jag tar ut soporna innan jag går.
translations.ro: Scot gunoiul afară înainte să plec.
translations.da: Jeg tager skraldet ud, før jeg går.
translations.ja: 出かける前にゴミを出します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the speaker as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; used transitively here with a direct object ('la poubelle').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiners the noun 'poubelle'.
Common noun, feminine; serves as the direct object of 'sors'.
Preposition expressing temporal anteriority; participates in the fixed construction 'avant de' + infinitive.
Preposition linking 'avant' to the infinitive; part of the 'avant de + infinitif' construction.
Infinitive verb functioning as a non-finite complement to the prepositional phrase 'avant de'.

sentences.target: Tu peux descendre la poubelle, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø desɑ̃dʁ la pubɛl, sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux descendre la poubelle, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø desɑ̃dʁ la pubɛl, sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you take down the trash, please?
translations.it: Per favore, porta giù la spazzatura.
translations.pt: Por favor, leva o lixo lá embaixo.
translations.ar: من فضلك أنزل القمامة إلى الأسفل.
translations.nl: Breng alsjeblieft het vuilnis naar beneden.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, ta søpla ned.
translations.da: Vær sød at bære skraldet ned.
translations.fi: Ole kiltti ja vie roskat alas.
translations.ja: ゴミを下に持っていってください。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; the addressee is the subject.
Finite verb (modal), present indicative 2nd person singular; expresses ability/permission.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux', denoting the action requested.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiners 'poubelle'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'descendre'.
Subordinating conjunction with elision before a vowel-initial word ('il'); introduces the polite clause 's'il te plaît'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; impersonal subject with 'plaît' in the fixed polite expression.
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (dative); indirect object of 'plaît'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; head of the subordinate clause in the formula 's'il te plaît' ('please').

translations.es: El cubo de basura está rebosando ahora.
translations.it: Il bidone della spazzatura sta traboccando adesso.
translations.vi: Thùng rác bây giờ đang tràn.
translations.pl: Kosz na śmieci teraz jest przepełniony.
translations.ro: Coșul de gunoi dă pe dinafară acum.
translations.cs: Koš na odpadky je teď přeplněný.
translations.ja: ゴミ箱が今あふれている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiners the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine; serves as the grammatical subject.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate meaning 'is overflowing'.
Temporal adverb; situates the event in the present moment.

sentences.target: Ils ont oublié la poubelle ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ilz ɔ̃t ublijé la pubɛl sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ils ont oublié la poubelle ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ilz ɔ̃t ublijé la pubɛl sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: They forgot the trash this morning.
translations.es: Se olvidaron de sacar la basura esta mañana.
translations.de: Sie haben heute Morgen den Müll vergessen.
translations.it: Stamattina si sono dimenticati di portare fuori la spazzatura.
translations.ko: 그들은 오늘 아침에 쓰레기를 내놓는 걸 잊었어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们今天早上忘了把垃圾拿出去。
translations.yue: 佢哋今日朝早唔記得拎垃圾出去。
translations.ru: Они сегодня утром забыли вынести мусор.
translations.pt: Eles esqueceram de colocar o lixo para fora esta manhã.
translations.he: הם שכחו להוציא את הזבל הבוקר.
translations.tr: Bu sabah çöpü dışarı çıkarmayı unuttular.
translations.vi: Họ đã quên mang rác ra ngoài sáng nay.
translations.ar: لقد نسوا إخراج القمامة هذا الصباح.
translations.nl: Ze vergaten vanmorgen het vuilnis buiten te zetten.
translations.uk: Вони сьогодні вранці забули винести сміття.
translations.hu: Ma reggel elfelejtették kivinni a szemetet.
translations.hi: उन्होंने आज सुबह कूड़ा बाहर निकालना भूल गए.
translations.pl: Oni dziś rano zapomnieli wynieść śmieci.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί ξέχασαν να βγάλουν τα σκουπίδια.
translations.nb: De glemte å sette ut søpla i morges.
translations.id: Mereka lupa mengeluarkan sampah pagi ini.
translations.sv: De glömde att ställa ut soporna i morse.
translations.ro: Au uitat să scoată gunoiul în această dimineață.
translations.da: De glemte at sætte skraldet ud i morges.
translations.fi: He unohtivat viedä roskat tänä aamuna.
translations.ja: 今朝はゴミを出し忘れた。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; refers to a group (mixed or masculine).
Auxiliary verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; forms the compound past (passé composé) with the participle.
Past participle; lexical verb in the compound tense ('ont oublié').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiners 'poubelle'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'oublier'.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'matin' to form the temporal noun phrase 'ce matin'.
Common noun; temporal complement indicating when the event occurred.
